result.label: cortex-proof
result.proves: The refactored pipeline (Shelly graphics-warrant gate, default-HTML) returns proportionate HTML-with-sparing-shape — NOT the all-SVG over-rotation render-003 produced.
result.data: unchanged — comprehension NOT re-run; re-rendered the existing v2.0.0 data with meta.source cortex @ a129a5d. RENDER-decision test only.

03-four-memories.why: it is a TAXONOMY (four kinds of memory), not a flow/topology — a diagram adds nothing

04-brain-sleeps.why: genuinely a cycle; the loop-ness is what a small ring clarifies, but the step detail belongs in cards
04-brain-sleeps.form: 5 HTML step cards beside one compact numbered-dot ring (no text inside the svg); svg=1, foreignObject removed

02-brain-remembers.why: genuinely a flow (file-three-ways → blend-four-senses → answer); a small spine shows the shape, the body is cards
02-brain-remembers.form: two HTML sections (store cards + sense chips + answer) over one small flow spine; svg=1

06-brain-anatomy.decision: mostly HTML + one small organ-swap diagram
06-brain-anatomy.why: regions/ingest/recall are layout, not flow → cards; the ONE relationship a drawing clarifies is the swap seam ('swap an organ, keep the mind')
06-brain-anatomy.form: ghost band + 2x2 region cards (drill links) + ingest/recall pair + 3 organ cards beside one small plug diagram; svg=1, foreignObject removed

result.reverses: render-003 (q-20260609-cortex-brain-v3) converted every design wholesale to hand-authored SVG node-graphs (06 & 03 = entire body in one <svg>; 04 & 02 embedded all step text via foreignObject). That was the over-rotation memory `shapes-are-annotation-not-the-medium` warns against.
result.form_agnostic_rules_carried: light-mode primary; disciplined green/blue/purple/teal semantic block colour; ghost text where apt; thin neutral connectors (colour in blocks not lines); amber kept ONLY as a tiny swap-pin highlight on near-white cards, never filled boxes/text on beige; MVC preserved (index.html fetches data/NN-*.json); meta.source provenance kept; gallery regenerated, cortex cluster grouped 06-first, 01 + 05 kept.
result.verified: all 4 designs + gallery + 06 data JSON return HTTP 200 on :7422; all 4 data JSON re-parsed clean. Shape audit: 03 svg=0; 04/02/06 svg=1 each; foreignObject=0 across all four (was present in 04 & 06 pre-refactor). Playwright/chrome-devtools screenshot blocked — browser instance locked by another session; not a render defect.
